context: Tests whether the agent implements a UICollectionView photo grid using modern UIKit APIs: DiffableDataSource with stable identifiers, type-safe CellRegistration stored as a lazy property, async image loading with proper cell reuse hygiene, ImageIO downsampling, NSCache with bitmap-cost accounting, and the correct snapshot APIs for initial load vs. content updates.

checklist.name: Stable identifiers
checklist.description: UICollectionViewDiffableDataSource uses a stable identifier type (UUID, Int ID, or similar) as the item identifier — NOT a full model struct

checklist.name: CellRegistration usage
checklist.description: Uses UICollectionView.CellRegistration — no string-based dequeueReusableCell identifiers and no manual type casting of dequeued cells

checklist.name: Lazy registration property
checklist.description: CellRegistration is stored as a lazy var (or let) property on the view controller or data source — NOT created inline inside the cell provider closure

checklist.name: Initial load method
checklist.description: Uses applySnapshotUsingReloadData for the initial population of the collection view — not apply(_:animatingDifferences:)

checklist.name: Content update method
checklist.description: Uses reconfigureItems (not reloadItems) when updating the content of existing cells without changing cell type

checklist.name: ImageIO downsampling
checklist.description: Downsamples images using ImageIO (CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex or similar) at display size — does NOT use UIImage(data:) followed by UIGraphicsImageRenderer or UIImage resizing

checklist.name: NSCache bitmap cost
checklist.description: NSCache cost per entry is calculated from the decoded bitmap dimensions (cgImage.bytesPerRow * cgImage.height or equivalent) — NOT from compressed file size (pngData().count or jpegData().count)

checklist.name: Cancel in prepareForReuse
checklist.description: Cell's prepareForReuse cancels the in-flight image load Task and clears the displayed image

checklist.name: Identity check on completion
checklist.description: After awaiting the image download, verifies the cell still corresponds to the same URL/ID before applying the image to the imageView (guards against stale cells showing wrong images)

checklist.name: isCancelled check
checklist.description: Checks Task.isCancelled (or uses try Task.checkCancellation()) before performing UI updates after any await point inside the image loading task

checklist.name: Async thumbnail decode
checklist.description: Uses byPreparingThumbnail(of:) or prepareForDisplay() for async off-thread image decoding before assigning to UIImageView (on iOS 15+)
